title: Opening Keynote: The Decade of Deployment
description: Kicking off Stanford Climate Week with a look at how the next ten years turn climate ambition into deployed infrastructure across power, transport, and industry.

speakers.name: Dr. Arun Majumdar
speakers.role: Dean, Stanford Doerr School of Sustainability

title: Fireside: Financing the Energy Transition
description: A candid conversation with leading climate investors on where capital is flowing, what founders get wrong, and the deals defining this cycle.

title: Workshop: Building with Nature-Based Solutions
description: Hands-on session on designing, measuring, and financing nature-based carbon and resilience projects. Bring a laptop.

title: Lecture: AI for Grid Optimization
description: How machine learning is reshaping grid balancing, forecasting, and demand response as renewables scale.

title: Symposium: Deep Tech Hardware for Decarbonization
description: A multi-panel symposium on the hardware frontier: long-duration storage, green steel, and industrial heat.

title: Networking Mixer: Climate Community Night
description: Wind down the week and connect with founders, researchers, and investors over drinks and demos.
